title: Jack Frost (Cobblemon)
description: Adds the beloved SMT demon Jack Frost
body:
Adds the hee-ho himself

Comes with lore-accurate(game-accurate) custom moves:
Bufu, Bufula, Bufudyne, Niflheim, Mind Charge and Hysterical Slap

Installation:
- Step 1: Put "jackfrost.zip" into your datapack and resource pack folders
- Step 2: Put the CONTENTS of "moves-abilities.zip" inside ".minecraft/showdown/data" 
- "moves.js" and "abilities.js" should both be replaced

Credits:
- Models, Textures and Animation: Me
- Balance and Game Design: Me, Peter, Lloyd
